description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 25, 2025 at 4:08 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a fallen utility line on 23rd Street near Rhode Island Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound on 23rd Street when the front of the Waymo AV made contact with a fallen utility line hanging in 
the travel lane. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The utility line sustained 
damage.
Print
Clear Form
